title: Statistics
subtitle: Overview of scans across all your QR codes.
staticNote: This QR code is static: its content is encoded directly in the image, so scans never reach our servers and cannot be counted. Create a dynamic QR code to track scans.

upgrade.title: Unlock detailed statistics
upgrade.message: Countries, cities, devices, browsers and the full scan history are available on the higher plan.

noDynamic.title: No dynamic QR codes
noDynamic.message: Statistics only apply to dynamic QR codes. Create one to start tracking scans.
